<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Boyce Lab — Genetic Epilepsy Landscape</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,600;9..144,800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Public+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --ink: #0e1a2b;
    --ink-2: #2c3e50;
    --paper: #f6f1e7;
    --paper-2: #ede4d3;
    --accent: #6d28d9;
    --accent-2: #8b5cf6;
    --tier1: #f3eaff;
    --tier1-border: #7c3aed;
    --tier2: #faf5ff;
    --tier2-border: #c4b5fd;
    --tier3: #fafaf7;
    --rule: #d4ccb8;
    --muted: #6b7280;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body {
    margin: 0; padding: 0;
    font-family: 'Public Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    background: var(--paper);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  header {
    padding: 32px 40px 24px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink);
    background: var(--paper);
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
  }
  .masthead {
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  h1 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 36px;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.05;
  }
  h1 .em { color: var(--accent); font-style: italic; }
  .subtitle {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    color: var(--ink-2);
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .meta {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-align: right;
  }
  .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  .controls {
    margin-top: 20px;
    display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
  }
  .search {
    flex: 1; min-width: 280px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
    background: white;
    border-radius: 0;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .search:focus { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: -1px; }
  .filter-group { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
  .chip {
    padding: 8px 14px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
    background: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.12s;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .chip:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
  .chip.active { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }
  .stats {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-left: auto;
  }
  .stats strong { color: var(--ink); font-size: 13px; }

  main { padding: 0 40px 60px; }

  .legend {
    display: flex; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 0;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-2);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
  .swatch { width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--ink); }
  .swatch.t1 { background: var(--tier1); }
  .swatch.t2 { background: var(--tier2); }
  .swatch.t3 { background: var(--tier3); }

  table {
    width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
    margin-top: 24px;
    background: white;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  thead {
    position: sticky; top: 200px;
    background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper);
    z-index: 50;
  }
  thead th {
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-right: 1px solid #2c3e50;
  }
  thead th:hover { background: #1a2b42; }
  thead th.sorted { background: var(--accent); color: white; }
  thead th .arrow { opacity: 0.5; margin-left: 4px; font-size: 9px; }
  thead th.sorted .arrow { opacity: 1; }
  tbody tr {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    transition: background 0.08s;
  }
  tbody tr.tier-1 { background: var(--tier1); }
  tbody tr.tier-2 { background: var(--tier2); }
  tbody tr.tier-3 { background: var(--tier3); }
  tbody tr:hover { background: #fbf7ff !important; }
  tbody tr.tier-1 { border-left: 3px solid var(--tier1-border); }
  tbody tr.tier-2 { border-left: 3px solid var(--tier2-border); }
  tbody td {
    padding: 10px 12px;
    vertical-align: top;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  td.gene {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 13px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  td.tier {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  td.tier .badge-1 { color: var(--tier1-border); }
  td.tier .badge-2 { color: var(--tier2-border); }
  td.tier .badge-3 { color: var(--muted); }
  td a {
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--accent);
  }
  td a:hover { color: var(--accent-2); border-bottom-style: solid; }
  td.muted { color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; }

  .col-disorder { max-width: 280px; }
  .col-foundation { max-width: 220px; }
  .col-platforms { max-width: 280px; }
  .col-platforms .pill {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin: 1px 2px 1px 0;
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid var(--ink-2);
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--ink-2);
    line-height: 1.4;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .col-platforms a.pill-link {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    color: var(--accent);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.12s;
  }
  .col-platforms a.pill-link:hover {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: white;
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  tbody tr.tier-1 .col-platforms .pill { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
  .col-resources { white-space: nowrap; min-width: 240px; }
  .col-resources .res-pill {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 1px 6px;
    margin: 1px 2px 1px 0;
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid var(--ink-2);
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--ink-2);
    line-height: 1.4;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.1s;
  }
  .col-resources .res-pill:hover {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: white;
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  tbody tr.tier-1 .col-resources .res-pill { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }

  /* FDA Patient Experience pill */
  .col-fda { max-width: 200px; font-size: 11px; }
  .col-fda .fda-pill {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 3px 9px;
    background: #fef3c7;
    color: #78350f;
    border: 1px solid #f59e0b;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: 'Public Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .col-fda a.fda-pill:hover {
    background: #f59e0b;
    color: white;
  }

  /* Social media pills */
  .col-social { white-space: nowrap; min-width: 130px; }
  .col-social .soc-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    margin: 1px 2px 1px 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1;
    transition: transform 0.1s, opacity 0.12s;
  }
  .col-social .soc-pill:hover { transform: scale(1.12); opacity: 0.88; }
  .col-social .soc-li { background: #0a66c2; }   /* LinkedIn blue */
  .col-social .soc-fb { background: #1877f2; }   /* Facebook blue */
  .col-social .soc-ig { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #f09433 0%, #e6683c 25%, #dc2743 50%, #cc2366 75%, #bc1888 100%); font-size: 8px; }
  .col-social .soc-yt { background: #ff0000; }   /* YouTube red */
  .col-social .soc-x  { background: #000000; }   /* X (Twitter) black */

  .col-therapeutics { max-width: 280px; font-size: 12px; }

  /* Submission button + modal */
  .submit-btn {
    align-self: center;
    padding: 9px 16px;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: white;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--accent);
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.12s;
  }
  .submit-btn:hover {
    background: var(--accent-2);
    border-color: var(--accent-2);
  }
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background: rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.5);
    display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1000;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .modal-overlay.active { display: flex; }
  .modal {
    background: var(--paper);
    border: 2px solid var(--ink);
    width: 100%; max-width: 540px;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 40px);
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    font-family: 'Public Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .modal h2 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 22px;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .modal .modal-intro {
    color: var(--ink-2);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .modal .modal-intro a { color: var(--accent); }
  .modal label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 14px 0 6px;
  }
  .modal label .req { color: var(--accent); }
  .modal input[type="text"],
  .modal input[type="email"],
  .modal textarea,
  .modal select {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 9px 12px;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 14px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--ink-2);
    background: white;
    color: var(--ink);
    border-radius: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .modal input:focus, .modal textarea:focus, .modal select:focus {
    outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: -1px;
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  .modal textarea { min-height: 110px; resize: vertical; font-family: inherit; }
  .modal .radio-group {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px 18px; margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .modal .radio-group label {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    margin: 0;
    font-family: 'Public Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: none;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .modal .radio-group input[type="radio"] {
    accent-color: var(--accent);
    margin: 0;
  }
  .modal-actions {
    display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end;
    margin-top: 22px;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .modal-actions button {
    padding: 10px 18px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }
  .modal-actions .cancel { background: white; color: var(--ink); }
  .modal-actions .cancel:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
  .modal-actions .send {
    background: var(--accent); color: white; border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  .modal-actions .send:hover { background: var(--accent-2); border-color: var(--accent-2); }
  .modal-actions .send:disabled {
    background: var(--rule); border-color: var(--rule); color: var(--ink-2);
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }
  .modal .close-x {
    position: absolute;
    top: 14px; right: 18px;
    background: none; border: none;
    font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .modal .close-x:hover { color: var(--ink); }
  .modal-wrapper { position: relative; }

  .empty-row td {
    text-align: center; padding: 60px;
    color: var(--muted); font-style: italic;
  }

  footer {
    margin-top: 40px; padding: 20px 40px;
    border-top: 2px solid var(--ink);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--ink-2);
  }
  footer a { color: var(--accent); }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    header { padding: 20px; }
    main { padding: 0 20px 40px; }
    h1 { font-size: 26px; }
    .controls { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
    .stats { margin-left: 0; }
    table { font-size: 11px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="masthead">
    <div>
      <h1>Boyce Lab <span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;">—</span> <span class="em">Genetic Epilepsy Landscape</span></h1>
      <div class="subtitle">Patient communities · research infrastructure · therapeutic programs</div>
    </div>
    <button id="open-submit" class="submit-btn" type="button">+ Suggest a correction</button>
  </div>
  <div class="controls">
    <input type="text" id="search" class="search" placeholder="Search genes, disorders, foundations, phenotypes…">
    <div class="filter-group">
      <button class="chip active" data-tier="all">All</button>
      <button class="chip" data-tier="1">Established</button>
      <button class="chip" data-tier="2">Emerging</button>
      <button class="chip" data-tier="3">Background</button>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-group">
      <button class="chip" data-filter="registry">Has registry</button>
      <button class="chip" data-filter="foundation">Has foundation</button>
      <button class="chip" data-filter="therapeutic">Active therapeutic</button>
    </div>
    <div class="stats" id="stats"></div>
  </div>
</header>

<main>
  <div class="legend">
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="swatch t1"></div>Established — active foundation and research infrastructure</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="swatch t2"></div>Emerging — partial infrastructure or growing community</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="swatch t3"></div>Background — gene confirmed; community organization not yet identified</div>
  </div>

  <table id="t">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th data-key="gene">Gene <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="tier">Status <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="inheritance">Inh. <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="phenotype">Phenotype <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="disorder">Clinical disorder <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="foundation">Patient foundation <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="platforms">Registry platform(s) <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="therapeutics">Therapeutic programs <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th data-key="fda_report">FDA Patient Experience <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th>Social</th>
        <th data-key="omim_gene">OMIM <span class="arrow">▲▼</span></th>
        <th>Resources</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="tbody"></tbody>
  </table>
</main>

<footer>
  A reference resource compiled by the Boyce Lab covering patient communities, registries, research centers, and therapeutic programs across genetic epilepsies. Data drawn from foundation websites, Simons Searchlight, Sanford CoRDS, Orphanet, OMIM, GeneReviews, and the Genes4Epilepsy curated gene resource. This is a living document — your knowledge makes it better. <a href="#" id="open-submit-footer">Submit a correction or addition</a>.
</footer>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="submit-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="submit-modal-title">
  <div class="modal-wrapper">
    <div class="modal">
      <button class="close-x" id="close-modal" aria-label="Close">×</button>
      <h2 id="submit-modal-title">Suggest a correction or addition</h2>
      <p class="modal-intro">Spot something out of date, missing, or wrong? Tell us. We update this resource based on community input. Your message will open in your email client, addressed to <a href="mailto:danielle@boycedatascience.com">danielle@boycedatascience.com</a> — review and send when you're ready.</p>

      <label for="sub-type">Type of submission <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <div class="radio-group">
        <label><input type="radio" name="sub-type" value="Correction" checked> Correction</label>
        <label><input type="radio" name="sub-type" value="Addition"> Addition</label>
        <label><input type="radio" name="sub-type" value="Question"> Question</label>
        <label><input type="radio" name="sub-type" value="Other"> Other</label>
      </div>

      <label for="sub-gene">Gene or topic</label>
      <input type="text" id="sub-gene" placeholder="e.g. KCNT1, or general feedback">

      <label for="sub-message">Message <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <textarea id="sub-message" placeholder="Describe the correction, addition, or question. Include source links if relevant." required></textarea>

      <label for="sub-name">Your name (optional)</label>
      <input type="text" id="sub-name">

      <label for="sub-email">Your email (optional, for reply)</label>
      <input type="email" id="sub-email" placeholder="you@example.com">

      <label for="sub-affiliation">Your affiliation (optional)</label>
      <input type="text" id="sub-affiliation" placeholder="e.g. lab, foundation, clinic">

      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button type="button" class="cancel" id="cancel-modal">Cancel</button>
        <button type="button" class="send" id="send-modal">Compose email</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const DATA = [{"gene": "AARS1", "hgnc": "HGNC:20", "entrez": "16", "ensembl": "ENSG00000090861", "omim_gene": "601065", "inheritance": "AR", "phenotype": "DEE", "tier": "3", "disorder": "", "foundation": "", "foundation_url": "", "registry": "", "registry_url": "", "platforms_list": [], "platforms_text": "", "ssl": "", "cords": "", "therapeutics": "", "linkedin": "", "facebook": "", "https://clinicaltrials.gov/search?term=AARS1&aggFilters=status:rec", "orpha_url": "", "us_centers": "", "intl_centers": "", "philanthropy": "", "pubmed_tier": ""}, {"gene": "AARS2", "hgnc": "HGNC:21022", "entrez": "57505", "ensembl": "ENSG00000124608", "omim_gene": "612035", "inheritance": "AR", "phenotype": "DEE", "tier": "3", "disorder": "", "foundation": "", "foundation_url": "", "registry": "", "registry_url": "", "platforms_list": [], "platforms_text": "", "ssl": "", "cords": "", "therapeutics": "", "linkedin": "", "facebook": "", "instagram": "", "youtube": "", "twitter": "https://www.genenames.org/data/gene-symbol-report/#!/symbol/AARS2", "ncbi_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/57505", "clinvar_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/clinvar/?term=AARS2%5Bgene%5D", "gnomad_url": "https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/gene/ENSG00000124608", "genereviews_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/?term=AARS2+AND+%22NBK1116%22%5Bbookacc%5D", "orphanet_gene_url": "https://www.orpha.net/en/disease/gene/AARS2", "clinicaltrials_url": "https://clinicaltrials.gov/search?term=AARS2&aggFilters=status:rec", "orpha_url": "", "us_centers": "", "intl_centers": "", "philanthropy": "", "pubmed_tier": ""}, {"gene": "ABAT", "hgnc": "HGNC:23", "entrez": "18", "ensembl": "ENSG00000183044", "omim_gene": "137150", "inheritance": "AR", "phenotype": "DEE", "tier": "3", "disorder": "", "foundation": "", "foundation_url": "", "registry": "", "registry_url": "", "platforms_list": [], "platforms_text": "", "ssl": "", "cords": "", "therapeutics": "", "linkedin": "", "https://www.genenames.org/data/gene-symbol-report/#!/symbol/ZNF526", "ncbi_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/116115", "clinvar_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/clinvar/?term=ZNF526%5Bgene%5D", "gnomad_url": "https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/gene/ENSG00000167625", "genereviews_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/?term=ZNF526+AND+%22NBK1116%22%5Bbookacc%5D", "orphanet_gene_url": "https://www.orpha.net/en/disease/gene/ZNF526", "clinicaltrials_url": "https://clinicaltrials.gov/search?term=ZNF526&aggFilters=status:rec", "orpha_url": "", "us_centers": "", "intl_centers": "", "philanthropy": "", "pubmed_tier": ""}, {"gene": "ZNHIT3", "hgnc": "HGNC:12309", "entrez": "9326", "ensembl": "ENSG00000273611", "omim_gene": "604500", "inheritance": "AR", "phenotype": "DEE", "tier": "3", "disorder": "", "foundation": "", "foundation_url": "", "registry": "", "registry_url": "", "platforms_list": [], "platforms_text": "", "ssl": "", "cords": "", "therapeutics": "", "linkedin": "", "facebook": "", "instagram": "", "youtube": "", "twitter": "", "fda_report": "", "fda_report_url": "", "contact_email": "", "pubmed_url": "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=ZNHIT3+epilepsy", "omim_url": "https://www.omim.org/entry/604500", "hgnc_url": "https://www.genenames.org/data/gene-symbol-report/#!/symbol/ZNHIT3", "ncbi_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/9326", "clinvar_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/clinvar/?term=ZNHIT3%5Bgene%5D", "gnomad_url": "https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/gene/ENSG00000273611", "genereviews_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/?term=ZNHIT3+AND+%22NBK1116%22%5Bbookacc%5D", "orphanet_gene_url": "https://www.orpha.net/en/disease/gene/ZNHIT3", "clinicaltrials_url": "https://clinicaltrials.gov/search?term=ZNHIT3&aggFilters=status:rec", "orpha_url": "", "us_centers": "", "intl_centers": "", "philanthropy": "", "pubmed_tier": ""}, {"gene": "ZSWIM6", "hgnc": "HGNC:29316", "entrez": "57688", "ensembl": "ENSG00000130449", "omim_gene": "615951", "inheritance": "AD", "phenotype": "DEE", "tier": "3", "disorder": "", "foundation": "", "foundation_url": "", "registry": "", "registry_url": "", "platforms_list": [], "platforms_text": "", "ssl": "", "cords": "", "therapeutics": "", "linkedin": "", "facebook": "", "instagram": "", "youtube": "", "twitter": "", "fda_report": "", "fda_report_url": "", "contact_email": "", "pubmed_url": "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=ZSWIM6+epilepsy", "omim_url": "https://www.omim.org/entry/615951", "hgnc_url": "https://www.genenames.org/data/gene-symbol-report/#!/symbol/ZSWIM6", "ncbi_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/57688", "clinvar_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/clinvar/?term=ZSWIM6%5Bgene%5D", "gnomad_url": "https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/gene/ENSG00000130449", "genereviews_url": "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/?term=ZSWIM6+AND+%22NBK1116%22%5Bbookacc%5D", "orphanet_gene_url": "https://www.orpha.net/en/disease/gene/ZSWIM6", "clinicaltrials_url": "https://clinicaltrials.gov/search?term=ZSWIM6&aggFilters=status:rec", "orpha_url": "", "us_centers": "", "intl_centers": "", "philanthropy": "", "pubmed_tier": ""}];

const tbody = document.getElementById('tbody');
const search = document.getElementById('search');
const stats = document.getElementById('stats');
let state = {
  sortKey: 'tier',
  sortDir: 'asc',
  query: '',
  tier: 'all',
  flags: new Set()
};

function escapeHtml(s) {
  if (s == null) return '';
  return String(s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":"&#39;"}[c]));
}

function urlOrText(text, url) {
  if (!text) return '<span class="muted">—</span>';
  if (!url) return escapeHtml(text);
  return '<a href="' + escapeHtml(url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' + escapeHtml(text) + '</a>';
}

function render() {
  const q = state.query.toLowerCase();
  let filtered = DATA.filter(d => {
    if (state.tier !== 'all' && d.tier !== state.tier) return false;
    if (state.flags.has('registry')) {
      // True if gene has at least one platform AND it's not exclusively academic-only
      const hasReg = d.platforms_list && d.platforms_list.length > 0
        && !d.platforms_list.every(p => p.label.startsWith('Academic only'));
      if (!hasReg) return false;
    }
    if (state.flags.has('foundation') && !d.foundation) return false;
    if (state.flags.has('therapeutic')) {
      const t = d.therapeutics.toLowerCase();
      if (!t || t === '—' || t.startsWith('preclinical only') || t === '') return false;
    }
    if (q) {
      const hay = [d.gene, d.disorder, d.foundation, d.phenotype,
                   d.therapeutics, d.us_centers, d.intl_centers, d.platforms_text, d.fda_report].join(' ').toLowerCase();
      if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });

  filtered.sort((a, b) => {
    let av = a[state.sortKey] || '';
    let bv = b[state.sortKey] || '';
    if (state.sortKey === 'tier') {
      av = parseInt(av) || 99;
      bv = parseInt(bv) || 99;
    }
    if (av < bv) return state.sortDir === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
    if (av > bv) return state.sortDir === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
    if (state.sortKey !== 'gene') {
      // Secondary sort by gene name
      return a.gene.localeCompare(b.gene);
    }
    return 0;
  });

  if (filtered.length === 0) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="13">No genes match the current filters.</td></tr>';
  } else {
    tbody.innerHTML = filtered.map(d => `
      <tr class="tier-${d.tier}">
        <td class="gene">${escapeHtml(d.gene)}</td>
        <td class="tier"><span class="badge-${d.tier}" title="${d.tier === '1' ? 'Established' : d.tier === '2' ? 'Emerging' : 'Background'}">${d.tier === '1' ? '●●●' : d.tier === '2' ? '●●○' : '●○○'}</span></td>
        <td>${escapeHtml(d.inheritance)}</td>
        <td>${escapeHtml(d.phenotype)}</td>
        <td class="col-disorder">${d.disorder ? escapeHtml(d.disorder) : '<span class="muted">—</span>'}</td>
        <td class="col-foundation">${urlOrText(d.foundation, d.foundation_url)}</td>
        <td class="col-platforms">${
          d.platforms_list && d.platforms_list.length
            ? d.platforms_list.map(p => p.url
                ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(p.url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pill pill-link">' + escapeHtml(p.label) + '</a>'
                : '<span class="pill">' + escapeHtml(p.label) + '</span>'
              ).join(' ')
            : '<span class="muted">—</span>'
        }</td>
        <td class="col-therapeutics">${d.therapeutics ? escapeHtml(d.therapeutics) : '<span class="muted">—</span>'}</td>
        <td class="col-fda">${
          d.fda_report
            ? (d.fda_report_url
                ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.fda_report_url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="fda-pill" title="FDA Patient Experience Report">' + escapeHtml(d.fda_report) + '</a>'
                : '<span class="fda-pill">' + escapeHtml(d.fda_report) + '</span>')
            : '<span class="muted">—</span>'
        }</td>
        <td class="col-social">${(() => {
          const links = [];
          if (d.linkedin && d.linkedin.startsWith('http'))   links.push('<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.linkedin)  + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="soc-pill soc-li" title="LinkedIn">in</a>');
          if (d.facebook && d.facebook.startsWith('http'))   links.push('<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.facebook)  + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="soc-pill soc-fb" title="Facebook">f</a>');
          if (d.instagram && d.instagram.startsWith('http')) links.push('<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.instagram) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="soc-pill soc-ig" title="Instagram">ig</a>');
          if (d.youtube && d.youtube.startsWith('http'))     links.push('<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.youtube)   + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="soc-pill soc-yt" title="YouTube">▶</a>');
          if (d.twitter && d.twitter.startsWith('http'))     links.push('<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.twitter)   + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="soc-pill soc-x" title="X / Twitter">X</a>');
          return links.length ? links.join('') : '<span class="muted">—</span>';
        })()}</td>
        <td>${d.omim_gene ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.omim_url) + '" target="_blank">' + escapeHtml(d.omim_gene) + '</a>' : '<span class="muted">—</span>'}</td>
        <td class="col-resources">
          <a href="${escapeHtml(d.pubmed_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="PubMed search">PubMed</a>
          ${d.hgnc_url ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.hgnc_url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="HGNC gene-symbol report">HGNC</a>' : ''}
          ${d.ncbi_url ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.ncbi_url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="NCBI Gene">NCBI</a>' : ''}
          <a href="${escapeHtml(d.clinvar_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="ClinVar variants">ClinVar</a>
          ${d.gnomad_url ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(d.gnomad_url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="gnomAD population frequencies">gnomAD</a>' : ''}
          <a href="${escapeHtml(d.genereviews_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="GeneReviews search">GR</a>
          <a href="${escapeHtml(d.orphanet_gene_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="Orphanet gene record">Orphanet</a>
          <a href="${escapeHtml(d.clinicaltrials_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="res-pill" title="ClinicalTrials.gov — recruiting and active trials">CT.gov</a>
        </td>
      </tr>
    `).join('');
  }

  // Update header sort indicators
  document.querySelectorAll('thead th').forEach(th => {
    th.classList.remove('sorted');
    const arrow = th.querySelector('.arrow');
    if (arrow) arrow.textContent = '▲▼';
    if (th.dataset.key === state.sortKey) {
      th.classList.add('sorted');
      if (arrow) arrow.textContent = state.sortDir === 'asc' ? '▲' : '▼';
    }
  });

  // Stats
  const t1 = filtered.filter(d => d.tier === '1').length;
  const t2 = filtered.filter(d => d.tier === '2').length;
  const t3 = filtered.filter(d => d.tier === '3').length;
  stats.innerHTML = `Showing <strong>${filtered.length}</strong> of ${DATA.length} genes · ${t1} established · ${t2} emerging · ${t3} background`;
}

document.querySelectorAll('thead th').forEach(th => {
  if (!th.dataset.key) return;
  th.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (state.sortKey === th.dataset.key) {
      state.sortDir = state.sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
    } else {
      state.sortKey = th.dataset.key;
      state.sortDir = 'asc';
    }
    render();
  });
});

search.addEventListener('input', e => {
  state.query = e.target.value;
  render();
});

document.querySelectorAll('.chip[data-tier]').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.chip[data-tier]').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    state.tier = btn.dataset.tier;
    render();
  });
});

document.querySelectorAll('.chip[data-filter]').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const f = btn.dataset.filter;
    if (state.flags.has(f)) {
      state.flags.delete(f);
      btn.classList.remove('active');
    } else {
      state.flags.add(f);
      btn.classList.add('active');
    }
    render();
  });
});

render();

// ---- Submission modal ----
const modal = document.getElementById('submit-modal');
const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-submit');
const openLink = document.getElementById('open-submit-footer');
const closeBtn = document.getElementById('close-modal');
const cancelBtn = document.getElementById('cancel-modal');
const sendBtn = document.getElementById('send-modal');

function openModal() {
  modal.classList.add('active');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('sub-message').focus(), 100);
}
function closeModal() {
  modal.classList.remove('active');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}

openBtn.addEventListener('click', openModal);
openLink.addEventListener('click', e => { e.preventDefault(); openModal(); });
closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
modal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === modal) closeModal(); });
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Escape' && modal.classList.contains('active')) closeModal();
});

sendBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const type = document.querySelector('input[name="sub-type"]:checked').value;
  const gene = document.getElementById('sub-gene').value.trim();
  const message = document.getElementById('sub-message').value.trim();
  const name = document.getElementById('sub-name').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('sub-email').value.trim();
  const affiliation = document.getElementById('sub-affiliation').value.trim();

  if (!message) {
    alert('Please add a message describing the correction, addition, or question.');
    document.getElementById('sub-message').focus();
    return;
  }

  const subjectParts = ['[Boyce Lab Landscape] ' + type];
  if (gene) subjectParts.push(gene);
  const subject = subjectParts.join(' — ');

  const lines = [
    'Type: ' + type,
    gene ? 'Gene/topic: ' + gene : null,
    '',
    'Message:',
    message,
    '',
    '---',
    name ? 'Name: ' + name : null,
    email ? 'Email: ' + email : null,
    affiliation ? 'Affiliation: ' + affiliation : null,
    '',
    'Submitted via the Boyce Lab Genetic Epilepsy Landscape dashboard.'
  ].filter(Boolean);
  const body = lines.join('\n');

  const mailto = 'mailto:danielle@boycedatascience.com'
    + '?subject=' + encodeURIComponent(subject)
    + '&body=' + encodeURIComponent(body);

  window.location.href = mailto;
  setTimeout(closeModal, 300);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
